page_metadata.biotools__summary: Data transformation for meta-analysis of microarray data: Transformation of gene expression data to signed probability scale (MCMC/EM methods). Combined differential expression on raw scale: Weighted Z-score after stabilizing mean-variance relation within platform.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Data transformation for meta-analysis of microarray data: Transformation of gene expression data to signed probability scale (MCMC/EM methods). Combined differential expression on raw scale: Weighted Z-score after stabilizing mean-variance relation within platform.
